title: Data Protection (GDPR)
info_description: Under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the right to view, export, and request deletion of your personal data. This page gives you full control over your information.
right_of_access_description: You can view all personal data stored about you. This includes your account information, member details, addresses, and payment data.
right_to_erasure_description: You can request the permanent deletion (anonymization) of all your personal data. This action cannot be undone.
deletion_staff_hint: As a staff member you can't self-request account deletion here — it must be requested directly from the administration, so you can't accidentally lock yourself out.
deletion_log_description: Admin view: All processed GDPR deletion requests for this organization.
no_deletions: No deletion requests have been processed.
deletion_warning_description: All your personal data will be permanently anonymized. You will be logged out immediately and will no longer be able to access your account.
deletion_consequences: Your name, email, address, payment information, and all other personal data will be replaced with anonymous placeholders. Non-personal data (delivery history, subscription records) will be preserved for accounting purposes.
advanced_rights_description: Advanced data rights: request a full export or account deletion.
approve_blocked_tooltip: Approval not possible — see the notes under Blockers.
email_changed_since: Email changed since the request was submitted
pending_deletions_description: Deletion requests still awaiting an office decision.
privacy_policy_save_failed: Privacy policy could not be saved
reject_reason_prompt: Please provide a reason why this request is being rejected.
status_pending_admin_detail: The deletion has been confirmed and is awaiting approval by the office.

vvt.title: Record of Processing Activities (Art. 30)
vvt.description: Structured export of the record of processing activities. Includes the controller, the data processors, each processing activity (purpose, legal basis, data categories, recipients, retention), and the Art. 32 safeguards.
